target: Verify new authored content system for Unit 1 with hand-crafted content: YouTube video embed in warmup, single-mode grammar games, Extra Fun links, spiral recall, vocabulary_review and grammar_review types
summary: Backend API tests: 14/14 PASSED. All authored content features verified via API. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation. Playwright testing limited by authentication persistence issues but code inspection confirms correct YouTube embed, hint display, and roadmap implementation.

issues: Login via Playwright browser automation not persisting across navigation - likely due to cookie/session handling in automated context

BACKEND_lesson1_activity_flow_10_steps.description: Lesson 1 has 10 activity steps (9 authored + auto_review)

BACKEND_lesson1_warmup_video_url.description: Lesson 1 warmup has YouTube video_url with hint and image_emoji
BACKEND_lesson1_warmup_video_url.evidence: API returns video_url='https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tVlcKp3bWH8', hint='You say this when you see someone.', image_emoji='👋', correct_answer='hello'

BACKEND_lesson2_fill_blank_single_mode.description: Lesson 2 grammar game is fill_blank mode ONLY (single mode, not mixed)
BACKEND_lesson2_fill_blank_single_mode.evidence: API returns game_type='fill_blank' with fill_blank_items and empty word_order_items

BACKEND_lesson2_spiral_recall.description: Lesson 2 warmup has spiral recall from L1 with hint 'The person who learns.'
BACKEND_lesson2_spiral_recall.evidence: API returns hint='The person who learns.', correct_answer='student'

BACKEND_lesson3_error_hunter.description: Lesson 3 grammar game is error_hunter mode with error sentence 'This are my friend.'
BACKEND_lesson3_error_hunter.evidence: API returns game_type='error_hunter', items[0].sentence='This are my friend.', has_error=true

BACKEND_units_sorted.evidence: GET /api/unified/stages/stage_1/units returns units sorted with unit_number=1 first

BACKEND_extra_links.description: All Unit 1 lessons have extra_links for Extra Fun section
BACKEND_extra_links.evidence: test_all_unit1_lessons_have_extra_links PASSED - all 4 lessons have extra_links

BACKEND_vocabulary_review.description: Lesson 4 vocabulary has is_review=true and review_words list
BACKEND_vocabulary_review.evidence: API returns is_review=true with 13 review words including hello, teacher, student, etc.

BACKEND_grammar_review.description: Lesson 4 grammar has is_review=true and review_patterns
BACKEND_grammar_review.evidence: API returns is_review=true with patterns ['I am...', 'I have...', 'This is my...']

FRONTEND_youtube_embed_code.description: YouTube video embed implemented correctly in warmup
FRONTEND_youtube_embed_code.evidence: Line 240-243 in UnifiedLessonPage.js: iframe with src={q.video_url.replace('watch?v=', 'embed/')}

FRONTEND_hint_display.description: Hint text displayed below question in warmup and grammar game

FRONTEND_roadmap.description: Lesson roadmap shows 6 grouped steps before lesson starts
FRONTEND_roadmap.evidence: Lines 28-35: ROADMAP_STEPS array with 6 grouped steps, LessonRoadmap component on line 38

api_test_results.lesson1_warmup_video: PASS - video_url, hint, image_emoji, correct_answer all present
api_test_results.lesson2_warmup_spiral: PASS - hint='The person who learns.', correct_answer='student'
api_test_results.lesson3_grammar_error_hunter: PASS - game_type='error_hunter', sentence='This are my friend.'

critical_code_review_comments: AUTHORED CONTENT WORKING: stage1_unit01.json properly seeded via seed_content_v4.py
YouTube embed: Line 240-243 correctly converts watch?v= to embed/ format
Hint display: Lines 260-261 show 'Hint: {q.hint}' in amber text for warmup
Fill-blank hint: Lines 965-966 display hint in grammar game fill_blank mode
Roadmap: LessonRoadmap component (line 38) shows 6 grouped steps (lines 28-35)
Single-mode games: seed_content_v4.py lines 155-188 correctly sets game_type based on mode
Review types: vocabulary_review (line 70-80) and grammar_review (line 134-142) handled correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% via code review - YouTube embed, hints, roadmap all correctly implemented

seed_data_creation: None - authored content in /app/backend/content/stage1_unit01.json seeded via seed_content_v4.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authored content for Unit 1 (4 lessons) verified. All backend APIs return correct data: YouTube video in L1 warmup, single-mode grammar games (word_order/fill_blank/error_hunter), spiral recall hints, extra_links, vocabulary_review and grammar_review types in L4. Frontend code correctly implements YouTube iframe embed, hint display, and lesson roadmap. Login requires authenticated session to access /unified routes.

mocked_api.pdf_generation: Client-side jsPDF - no backend API needed
